turns.user_message: I woke up with this heavy weight on my chest this morning. It's just a dull ache that won't go away.
That tightness in my chest has become my normal state. I feel it most when I think about how distant everything has become.
My whole body feels hollowed out, like I'm just a shell of a person. The emptiness inside is so vast it's terrifying.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
